title: Supervisor-tool timeout: tool_returned.output is 'Error: tool execution timed out after Nms'
description: When a Config-declared RPC tool's tool_exec_request is not answered within timeout_ms, the runner MUST (a) emit tool_exec_timed_out with source='runner', (b) return an Error: -prefixed string to the model so it can reason about retry, and (c) emit tool_returned carrying that string. The Error: prefix is symmetric with §8 step-4 (Error: prefix on tool_exec_resolved.error) so models have one convention for both 'tool failed' cases. SPEC.md §9.3 normative.

tools.name: slow_lookup
tools.description: A supervisor-executed tool the supervisor deliberately ignores.

match.output: Error: tool execution timed out after 50ms

forbidden_events.label: no tool_exec_resolved when supervisor never responded
